hints.description: This company owns, operates, and leases a large portfolio of communications infrastructure, primarily cell towers, distributed antenna systems, and fiber optic networks. They provide the critical infrastructure that enables wireless carriers and other service providers to deliver connectivity to businesses and consumers. Notably, they focus on providing sites for 5G deployment and expanding broadband access.
hints.funFact1: The company was formed in 2013 through the spin-off of R**'s North American tower business, demonstrating a strategic shift in focus towards communications infrastructure.
hints.funFact2: CEO Jay W***** previously held leadership roles at American Tower Corporation, bringing extensive experience in the tower industry to the company.
